title: Astonishingly Swift
description: A modpack combining multiple optimization mods, bringing the best performance while keeping the experience to OptiFine as close as possible.
body:
# Astonishingly Swift
Previously known as yuriko's optimization pack

### FROM a0.5 ONWARDS, JAVA 22 OR LATER IS REQUIRED FOR SELECT MODS.
### PLEASE USE JAVA 25, WHICH IS PRE-INSTALLED WITH MODRINTH AND CAN BE SELECTED IN INSTANCE SETTINGS.


This is Astonishingly Swift. This pack focuses on delivering the best performance on any PC, while keeping OptiFine features, like zooming and dynamic lights.

For the best performace, give the pack 4GB(4096MB) or more RAM. Don't give the pack more than half of your RAM capacity.
